amount.description: Amount to transfer in ISO 4217 minor currency units

company_entry_description.description: Company entry description ACH field. Originator inserts this field's value to provide the Receiver with a description of the entry's purpose.

currency.description: ISO 4217 alphabetic currency code of the transfer amount

dc_sign.description: The type of transaction (debit or credit). A debit is a transfer in and a credit is a transfer out of the originating account

effective_date.description: Effective date transaction proccesses (is_same_day needs to be false or not present at all)

external_data.description: Additional transfer metadata structured as key-value pairs

final_customer_id.description: ID of the international customer that receives the final remittance transfer (required for OFAC enabled payments)

is_same_day.description: Send as same day ACH transaction (use only is_same_day without specific effective_date)

originating_account_id.description: The unique identifier for an originating account

receiving_account_id.description: The unique identifier for an receiving account

reference_info.description: Will be sent to the ACH network and maps to Addenda record 05 - the recipient bank will receive this info
